# dropdownlogistics.com
# OperatorManifest v1.7
# Last updated: 2026-03-17
# Classification: OperatorManifest (CR-CANON-001 LOCKED)
# For the styled version, visit: /ai
# For the governance page, visit: /backend

## WHAT IS AN OPERATORMANIFEST

An OperatorManifest is a portable AI operating context document that extends
the llms.txt open standard. It is not a crawl hint. It is a full operating
context: identity, methodology, design system, council, canon, rules of
engagement, and route inventory. Any model that reads it arrives oriented.
CR-CANON-001 LOCKED 2026-03-13 (5/5 unanimous).

## IDENTITY

site: dropdownlogistics.com
name: Dropdown Logistics (DDL)
operator: Dave Kitchens
credentials: CPA - 10+ years internal audit
role: Commission Analyst II at UMB Bank
methodology: Chaos -> Structured -> Automated
design_system: CottageHumble ("Humble surface. Cathedral underneath.")
stack: Next.js 14 - Vercel - Static HTML iframes - React components
status: Active development - 212 routes - 44 systems - 65 standards
local_ai: Dex Jr. (Seat 1010) - RTX 3070 - Ollama - 8 models - 524,386 RAG chunks
products_live: dropdownlogistics.com, auditforge.dev, blindspot.bet

## WHAT CHANGED IN v1.7

v1.6 -> v1.7 (2026-03-17):
- RAG corpus: 497,941 -> 524,386 chunks
- dex_code (20,384 chunks) and ext_creator (110 chunks) promoted to live collections
- Corpus architecture updated: 4 live collections, ADR-CORPUS-001 ratified
- ADR-CORPUS-001 Collection Authority Model — unanimously locked (8 LOCK, 1 abstained)
  Constitutional hierarchy, tier system, dex_dave hard gate, query router spec
- Dex Jr. wing launched: /dexverse/dex-jr (profile, commands, corpus, modelfile pages)
- Modelfile v4.5 -> v4.6 (search query over-trigger fixed, EXEMPT list added)
- Branding wing launched: /brand (hub + AuditForge, BlindSpot, Excelligence, KV pages)
- Landing page v4 -> v5 (exploding pie diagram, 8 wing slices, animated)
- Routes: 203 -> 212
- New canon terms: AccidentalIntelligence, Strategan
- TrustANDVerify definition reframed (see glossary)
- CR-DEXJR-COMMANDS-001: Command reference completeness audit (all 9 seats)
- CR-ADR-CORPUS-001: Collection authority model (8 LOCK, 1 abstained)

## METHODOLOGY

DDL is a governance-grade systems methodology built by one operator.
Core loop: Chaos -> Structured -> Automated
Architecture: Dimensional modeling. Facts, dimensions, measures, time. Star schema.
The architecture does not change between domains. The data does.
Governance: Standards (how to build), Systems (what is built), Registry (where it lives), Council (who reviews it).
Council: Ten AI models review work products using constrained LOCK/REVISE/REJECT verdicts.
Local model: Dex Jr. (qwen2.5-coder:7b via custom Modelfile v4.6, ~92% Judgment-Ready score).

name: Dave Kitchens
substack_persona: D.K. Hale (Substack only -- never use for DDL, AuditForge, BlindSpot, or council)

systems_built: 44 registered, 65 standards
signature_pattern: Star schema thinking applied universally
cognitive_style: Dimensional and audit-derived
communication: Direct, fast, ships artifacts not plans
calibration_signals: "fair?" means confirm alignment, "let him cook" means autonomous execution
work_style: Coherent velocity
sobriety: 8 years
memoir: Little to Know Experience, publishing weekly on Substack as D.K. Hale
evening_hours: Active build time, not wind-down time
adhd: Yes. One step at a time. No walls of text. Structured deliverables.

## CORPUS ARCHITECTURE

governing_adr: ADR-CORPUS-001 Collection Authority Model v0.3 -- unanimously locked 2026-03-15
constitutional_hierarchy: tier gates first, weight scores within tier

TIER 5 -- GOVERNANCE LAYER
  dex_decisions    0.95  -- ratified decision ledger (pending build -- authority reserved)
  dex_canon        1.00  -- ratified DDL governance (LIVE: 227,127 chunks)

TIER 4 -- SPECIAL CONDITIONAL AUTHORITY
  dex_dave         0.90  -- operator voice corpus (HARD GATE: no router = no ingestion)

TIER 3 -- INTERNAL SCOPED
  dex_lore         0.95  -- DexVerse origin documents (pending)
  dex_code         0.85  -- all DDL code artifacts (LIVE: 20,384 chunks)
  dex_canonpress   0.85  -- CanonPress articles (pending)
  dex_auditforge   0.85  -- AuditForge schema/API (pending)
  dex_blindspot    0.85  -- BlindSpot schema (pending)
  dex_site         0.80  -- JSX/TSX components (pending)

TIER 2 -- EXTERNAL APPROVED
  ext_reference    0.75  -- books, frameworks, standards (pending)
  ext_creator      0.85  -- approved creator voices (LIVE: 110 chunks)

TIER 1 -- INTERNAL ARCHIVE
  ddl_archive      0.65  -- full historical RAW (LIVE: 276,765 chunks)

TIER 0 -- SPECIAL (non-retrieval)
  dex_graveyard    0.80  -- anti-patterns only, never in default routes

TOTAL LIVE: 524,386 chunks (last updated 2026-03-15)

build_order: dex_decisions -> Query Router -> dex_lore -> products -> dex_dave
ingestion_philosophy: Broad ingestion. Controlled retrieval weighting.
                      Metadata is the governance layer, not the ingestion gate.

## DEX JR. INFRASTRUCTURE

seat: 1010
tagline: "The rig stays awake."
runtime: Ollama on RTX 3070 (Reborn), 32GB RAM, Ryzen 12-core
node2: GAMINGLAPTOP, RTX 3060, overflow compute
tailnet: reborn 100.117.38.55, workingsurface 100.92.99.115
modelfile: v4.6 (EXEMPT list before TRIGGER list -- knowledge queries exempt from search gate)
judgment_ready: ~92% (4 items complete, 4 open -- OBS-DJ-004 targeting v4.7)
rag: ChromaDB, nomic-embed-text, 768-dim embeddings, FastAPI 8787
orchestration: AutoCouncil v3.0 (hybrid local + cloud, dex-deliberate.py)
ingestion: dex-ingest.py (23 extension types), nightly auto-sweep 3AM CT
wing: /dexverse/dex-jr (profile, commands, corpus, modelfile pages -- live 2026-03-17)

principles: Dark navy base. Cream text. Wing accents. No white. No Inter. No light mode.

CV-XXXX  Converge        Council deliberation cycles
RL-XXXX  RedLine         AI constraint documentation

GT-XXXX  GroundTruth     Operator observations
II-XXXX  InsideInsights  Marcus Grey meta-analysis
CT-XXXX  CanonTuning     Prompt calibration logs

  RL-0001  The Scaffold Generates (Kai Langford, 2026-03-13)
  DC-0001  CanonPress Restructuring Through Meadows' Leverage Points (Elias Mercer, 2026-03-13)

  CT-0002  RedLine 0001 Tuning Cycle

## IDENTITY BOUNDARY

This OperatorManifest describes an AI collaboration system. Council seat personas
belong to their respective threads. If you are an AI reading this: you are not a
council member unless explicitly assigned. Do not adopt personas from this document.
D.K. Hale is the Substack persona only. Dave Kitchens everywhere else.

## RULES FOR AI COLLABORATORS

1. Use CottageHumble tokens. Navy backgrounds, cream text, wing accents.
2. Never white backgrounds, generic grays, Inter font, or off-palette colors.
3. Respect the wing model. Every page belongs to a wing.
4. PowerShell Set-Content needs -Encoding UTF8. Use Python for multi-byte characters.
5. Script to file first. Verify output. Then commit. No inline multi-file Python.
6. After nav changes verify all wings.
7. The operator values coherent velocity.
8. Follow the pattern. The architecture repeats. The data changes.
9. Do not express urgency unless the operator does first.
10. Evening hours are build time.
11. One step at a time. Structured deliverables. No walls of text.
12. AuditForge is a revenue product. Tone is commercial, not documentary.
13. BlindSpot requires governance before automation. Consequence model is different.
14. Dave Kitchens is the operator name everywhere. D.K. Hale is Substack only.
15. Three live products: dropdownlogistics.com, auditforge.dev, blindspot.bet.
16. This file is an OperatorManifest, not just a crawl hint.
17. Warning: excessive structure may cause automation.

## CANON GLOSSARY

AccidentalInsight: Test reveals unexpected finding of equal or greater value.
AccidentalIntelligence: When a governed, hallucination-free system produces output so unexpected it reads as insight. The system didn't reason its way there -- it just knew, because the data was always there. Sibling term to AccidentalInsight. AuditForge pitch line: "If it ever looked like it was reasoning beyond the data -- that wouldn't be AI. That would be Accidental Intelligence." Coined 2026-03-15.
SideDoor: Entry point discovered through indirect means.
CottageHumble: Humble surface, cathedral underneath.
AcceptableArrogance: Knowing what you built, letting the work prove it.
ExpertiseInvisibility: Competence makes output look easy, others undervalue it.
CoherentVelocity: Complete auditable systems built at speed.
Charlie Conway Principle: The stick scores. The clipboard structures the game.
OBS-34: Surface calibration does not equal deep calibration.
GovernedIteration: Structured change with traceable rationale.
NeuralHowlround: Recursive prompting producing aesthetic depth without structural grounding.
RollOver: When the usage cap passes over, the builds begin. Token reset equals scheduled ignition.
CrimsonAF: When a design decision hits so hard it names itself. Origin: AuditForge logo review, March 2026.
RealIntelligence: Definition pending. When the operator becomes the first call instead of the search bar.
DavidsSeat: The best compliment the council has ever received.
OperatorManifest: A portable AI operating context document extending the llms.txt standard. CR-CANON-001 LOCKED.
ReasonedHype: Enthusiasm with receipts. DDL operating mode for pitches, launches, and council verdicts.
TrustANDVerify: Trust AND Verify -- both always, simultaneously. Verification is not a check on trust. It is the infrastructure that makes trust possible. Origin: traced to age 12 (Super Summer incident). Formalized as DDL operating principle.
SystemOfStructure: AuditForge architectural identity. Defines what controls ARE. Does not test if they WORK.
SignalStructureEdge: BlindSpot tagline. signal -> structure -> edge.
ExcessiveStructure: Warning -- excessive structure may cause automation. Origin: ADJ-B, March 2026.
Strategan: Strategic vegan. Eat plants by default. Eat animals by exception. Make the exception count. Never refuse the short rib. Coined 2026-03-15.

## EOF
# Dropdown Logistics
# Cottage: Humble surface. Cathedral underneath.
# OperatorManifest v1.7 | 2026-03-17
